name: Workflow Structural Patterns
description: Formalized taxonomy of workflow phases, agents, and skills.
best_practices: Always include '## Trigger Conditions' and 'Trigger Examples:'
Ensure all phases follow the Goal/Agents/Skills/Tools/Actions structure
anti_patterns: Using CamelCase for workflow filenames (use kebab-case)
Leaving TODO markers in production workflows
